title: 10 Stocks That Could Benefit From the FIFA World Cup 2022
text: The FIFA 2022 World Cup is currently underway and is scheduled to run till December 18.

title: LiveOne Partners with eBay on Exclusive Top Star Sneaker Experience Merging Pop Culture, Style and Music for Loyalty Members   Event Featured Zack Bia DJ Set and Performances by R&B Hitmaker Jeremih, Chase B and DJ Five
text: LOS ANGELES--( BUSINESS WIRE )--LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO), an award-winning, creator-first, music, entertainment and technology platform, announced today that it partnered with eBay (Nasdaq: EBAY), a global commerce leader that connects millions of buyers and sellers around the world, to produce and market the exclusive eBay Top Star VIP red carpet event that merged together sneakers, pop culture, style and music. The star-studded event for eBay's invite-only loyalty sneaker community members, celebrity sneakerheads and social influencers took place in Long Beach, CA on Saturday, November 19, 2022, and featured a Zack Bia DJ set and performances by Jeremih, DJ Five and Chase B.

title: eBay Motors Auctions One-of-a-Kind Vehicles Collected from a Nationwide Road Trip of America's Hottest Car Cultures
text: 'Parts of America' will arrive in LA on November 17, revealing a collection of eleven custom rides created by leading car builders with four of the vehicles going up for sale on eBay SAN JOSE, Calif. , Nov. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, eBay Motors arrives in Los Angeles to mark the finale of its 'Parts of America' tour, the ultimate cross-country car enthusiast road trip.

title: 2 Value Stocks You Can Buy Right Now With Less Than $100
text: If you're looking for cheap, then look no further.

title: eBay Opens Store in NYC that Accepts Pre-Owned Luxury as Currency
text: Shoppers are invited to have their jewelry, handbags, and watches appraised and exchanged for "closet currency" to purchase authentic items from eBay's top luxury sellers SAN JOSE, Calif. , Nov. 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Open during Jewelry Week in the heart of New York's  iconic Diamond District, the eBay Luxury Exchange capitalizes on the skyrocketing value of authenticated luxury items by letting shoppers exchange jewelry, handbags and watches from top brands like Gucci, Rolex, and Van Cleef & Arpels.

title: Battered E-Commerce Stocks Get Off The Mat After Inflation Beatdown
text: Amazon stock, and other e-commerce companies, staged a hot rally following a closely watched report indicating inflation was easing. The post Battered E-Commerce Stocks Get Off The Mat After Inflation Beatdown appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Is eBay Stock a Buy After Q3 Earnings?
text: The e-commerce company is grappling with changing consumer behavior.

title: eBay Inc. Announces Pricing $1.15 Billion Senior Unsecured Notes Offering
text: SAN JOSE, Calif. , Nov. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- eBay Inc. (Nasdaq: EBAY) (the "Company" or "eBay") announced today the pricing of a $1,150,000,000 underwritten public offering of its senior unsecured notes, consisting of $425,000,000 of 5.900% Notes due 2025 (the "2025 Notes"), $300,000,000 of 5.950% Notes due 2027 (the "2027 Notes") and $425,000,000 of 6.300% Notes due 2032 (the "2032 Notes").

title: Best E-Commerce Profit Margin And 9x EPS: eBay Left For Dead
text: Perhaps one of the smartest stagflation or hyperinflation hedge ideas I can find is also the leading e-commerce retailer for profit margins. While Wall Street is not excited about its low-growth immediate future, long-term investors will love an insanely low valuation and high dividend yield.

title: eBay: Bidding For Value
text: eBay delivered a solid Q3 2022 beat, with regards to both EPS and revenues. eBay's guidance for Q4 2022 came in slightly lower than what analyst had expected - but eBay management has a history of guiding lower than actual results.

title: eBay (EBAY) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Dip Y/Y
text: eBay's (EBAY) third-quarter 2022 results reflect strength in advertising business despite the softness in transactional activities and sluggish marketing services.

title: eBay or Etsy: Which Is The Better Buy?
text: eBay and Etsy are comparable businesses with striking contrasts that make one good for blue-chip dividend investors and the other better for growth portfolios.

title: eBay, Inc. (EBAY) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: eBay, Inc. (NASDAQ:EBAY ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 2, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Joe Billante - Vice President, Investor Relations Jamie Iannone - President and Chief Executive Officer Steve Priest - SVP, Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Douglas Anmuth - JPMorgan Eric Sheridan - Goldman Sachs Colin Sebastian - Baird Stephen Ju - Credit Suisse Deepak Mathivanan - Wolfe Research Curtis Nagle - Bank of America Youssef Squali - Truist Securities John Blackledge - Cowen Richard Kramer - Arete Research Sean Dunlop - Morningstar Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. My name is Brent, and I will be your conference operator today.

title: EBay stock jumps after earnings beat, in-line holiday forecast
text: EBay Inc. shares jumped more than 7% in the extended session Wednesday after the online marketplace beat expectations for earnings and revenue and predicted an in-line holiday quarter.

title: eBay Inc. Reports Better Than Expected Third Quarter 2022 Results
text: Revenue of $2.4 billion, down 5% on an as-reported basis and down 2% on an FX-Neutral basis Gross Merchandise Volume of $17.7 billion, down 11% on an as-reported basis and down 5% on an FX-Neutral basis GAAP and Non-GAAP EPS per diluted share of $(0.13) and $1.00, respectively, on a continuing operations basis GAAP and Non-GAAP operating margin of 23.9% and 28.9%, respectively Returned over $421 million to shareholders in Q3, including $301 million of share repurchases and $120 million paid in cash dividends SAN JOSE, Calif. , Nov. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- eBay Inc. (Nasdaq: EBAY), a global commerce leader that connects millions of buyers and sellers around the world, today reported financial results for its third quarter ended September 30, 2022.

title: EBAY Contends With Sour Pre-Earnings Sentiment
text: Online bidding giant eBay Inc (NASDAQ:EBAY) is just one in a slew of big names to report earning this week, with its third-quarter results due out after the close this evening, Nov. 2.

title: Pitney Bowes, eBay extend cross-border shipping partnership
text: Pitney Bowes announced it will continue to support eBay sellers as the e-commerce platform transitions from its Global Shipping Program (GSP) to the new eBay International Shipping service. Both programs support retailers selling across borders in the U.S. The global shipping and mailing company also said it has renewed its agreement with eBay to continue supporting eBay's U.K. Global Shipping Program.

title: Pitney Bowes and eBay Announce Key Cross-Border Partnerships in the US and UK
EBay Stock To Beat The Consensus In Q3?
text: eBay (NASDAQ: EBAY) is scheduled to report its fiscal Q3 2022 results on Wednesday, November 2, 2022. We expect the stock to edge past the consensus estimates.
